source_meta.source_document: ACTIS Total Hip System and Pinnacle Acetabular Cup System Surgical Technique

systems.system_notes: Primary total hip arthroplasty platform combining ACTIS femoral and PINNACLE acetabular families.

trays.tray_notes: System materials reference dedicated stem and acetabular instrumentation.

components.component_notes: Core PINNACLE acetabular shell family referenced in product and technique materials.
Core PINNACLE liner family referenced in product and technique materials.

Femoral head family used with the ACTIS / PINNACLE platform.
